differential_diagnoses: Community-acquired bacterial pneumonia with severe sepsis/ARDS
next_steps: Send serum for Hantavirus-specific IgM and IgG ELISA
Perform RT-PCR for Hantavirus on peripheral blood and/or respiratory secretions
Obtain specialized infectious disease consultation for endemic zoonoses (e.g., Hantavirus, Leptospirosis)
Monitor fluid status carefully using echocardiography and clinical assessment to avoid worsening pulmonary edema
Continue broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage pending specific diagnostic results
Consider bronchoalveolar lavage with fungal and bacterial cultures if clinical stability permits
